case_title: GUSTAVO DONIS ET AL VS. MAYRA HERNADEZ

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DECLARATION OF DEFENDANT'S CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF DONIS, GUSTAVO
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF DONIS, GUSTAVO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY DONIS, GUSTAVO GONZALEZ, RINA AS TO DEFENDANT HERNADEZ, MAYRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-29-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE CONTINUED TO PROVIDE A SPANISH INTERPERTER FOR PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-13-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-13-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG PLAINTIFFS GUSTAVO DONIS AND RINA GONZALES ARE PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER SHANNON RAINTREE. DEFENDANT MAYRA HERNANDEZ IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS WALTER VELASQUEZ, HUSBAND, BOTH ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-13-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DONIS, GUSTAVO GONZALEZ, RINA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HERNADEZ, MAYRA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-04-2021 - CONTINUED ON THE COURTS OWN MOTION TO MAY-25-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: W. TRUPEK, (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-29-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAY-04-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN (D506)
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-17-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-30-2021 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED JUN-29-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HERNADEZ, MAYRA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-25-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-30-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF GUSTAVO DONIS IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF RINA GONZALES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MAYRA HERNANDEZ IS PRESENT. ALL PARTIES ARE ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER MARGO SEELY. SERVICE IS NOT PROPER AND NO PROOF FILED. DEFENDANT WILL NOT WAIVE SERVICE, AND STATES THAT PLAINTIFF HAS THE WRONG ADDRESS FOR THE HER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DONIS, GUSTAVO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-17-2021 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO SEP-13-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS GUSTAVO DONISIS AND RINA GONZALES ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT MAYRA HERNANDEZ IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF MAKES A REQUEST FOR A SPANISH INTERPERTER. A COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPERTER IS NOT AVAILABLE AND THE MATTER IS CONTINUED TO ALLOW FOR A SPANISH INTERPERTER TO BE AVAILABLE TO ASSIST PLAINTIFF. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
